name: DecisionGraph
description: DecisionGraph is a local-first library for immutable AI decision traces. It is used for audit-ready records and deterministic replays in compliance and approval workflows.

name: SchemaPilot
description: SchemaPilot is a governance-first data platform for building AI-ready datasets. It is used to control schema quality, access policies, and deterministic pipelines.

name: PECR
description: PECR is a policy-enforced runtime for AI context retrieval. It is used to produce deterministic responses with auditable evidence and clear permission outcomes.

name: retokenization-invariance-atlas
description: retokenization-invariance-atlas is a deterministic evaluation framework for prompt-format sensitivity. It is used to test how formatting changes affect QA robustness before production.

name: ScrubID
description: ScrubID is an identifiability-aware audit pipeline for mechanistic interpretability claims. It is used to verify whether interpretability conclusions are reproducible and evidence-backed.

name: certipatch
description: certipatch is a reproducible specification-repair framework for frozen language models. It is used to patch failing behaviors and verify fixes with deterministic certificates.

name: discover-then-distill-paper
description: discover-then-distill-paper is a research implementation separating LoRA adaptation from self-distillation. It is used to compare short-term adaptation versus durable model improvement under matched compute.

name: cost-watchdog
description: Cost Watchdog is a self-hosted cost monitoring and anomaly detection platform. It is used to ingest cost data, detect anomalies automatically, and notify teams before overspend appears in monthly or yearly reporting.

name: VeilPack
description: VeilPack is an offline, fail-closed privacy gate for enterprise data pipelines. It is used to detect sensitive values, redact outputs, and ship verifiable data packs.

name: ContextGraph
description: ContextGraph is a self-hosted, privacy-aware process intelligence platform from Slack, Jira, and GitHub metadata. It is used to improve execution visibility without violating privacy boundaries.

name: incitape
description: incitape is a telemetry tape system for reproducible incident replay. It is used to debug failures and run consistent postmortems.

name: AvalancheLLM
description: AvalancheLLM is a reproducibility pack for analyzing gated-MLP activation cascades. It is used to study instability patterns and test controlled gain interventions.

name: Veil
description: Veil is a local-first PII detection and redaction toolkit for text and documents. It is used to sanitize sensitive content offline before sharing or processing.

name: egress-lockfile
description: egress-lockfile is a versioned network egress policy lockfile. It is used to control and audit allowed outbound destinations like dependency management.

name: AgentGate
description: AgentGate is a policy and approval gateway for enterprise AI agents. It is used to enforce action controls before autonomous workflows execute.

name: AnnexOps
description: AnnexOps is an Evidence-Pack-as-Code platform for EU AI Act compliance. It is used to prepare, version, and validate workforce-AI evidence packages.

name: flakeguard
description: flakeguard is a GitHub Actions flake detection and monitoring system. It is used to identify unstable tests and improve CI signal quality.

name: BatteryPassportCompiler
description: BatteryPassportCompiler is a deterministic compiler for Battery Passport artifacts. It is used to generate signed proof objects, QR payloads, and replayable audit outputs.

name: cis-technical-report
description: cis-technical-report is a technical report and reproducibility package for the CIS methodology. It is used to translate determinism-first reliability design into deployable guidance.

name: cachemedicpp-research
description: cachemedicpp-research is a research package for deterministic KV-cache corruption and repair studies. It is used to reproduce failures and validate robust recovery strategies.

name: intake-routing-engine
description: intake-routing-engine is a self-hosted email intake and routing engine. It is used to extract structured facts and route requests with deterministic, auditable rules.
